name: Database Remote Login Failure
notes: Increases the severity of a failed login attempt to a database from a remote network.
conditions_text: when the source is Remote
when an event matches all of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
TD_list: APPLY Database Remote Login Failure on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source is Remote
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
